post.description: Upload a document for processing (fire-and-forget).

Upload a document and poll until processing completes or timeout.

Note: does not accept the `demo` flag. Demo uploads use the async endpoint
with client-side polling so the Lambda doesn't hold a connection open for
the full processing duration.

get.description: Get processing results by job ID.

delete.description:
Delete a document by job ID.

soft_delete=True (default): retain the S3 files, mark the record DELETED
(recoverable). soft_delete=False: also purge every S3 copy of the document -
original upload, preprocessing copies, and BDA output (hard delete).

post.description: Search for multiple documents by job IDs.
Upload multiple documents as a single batch.
Upload a ZIP archive of documents as a single batch.

get.description:
Get status of all documents in a batch.

Batch completion is lazily evaluated: when all jobs are complete this endpoint
updates the batch status to COMPLETED. For real-time updates use DDB Streams
or EventBridge.

post.description: Create a new document build for multi-page upload.
Upload a single page for multi-page document processing.
Upload multiple pages to a document build in one request.
Submit a multi-page build for processing (fire-and-forget).
Submit a multi-page build and poll until processing completes or timeout.

get.description: Get document build details including all uploaded pages.

delete.description: Delete an entire document build and all its pages.
Delete a specific page from a document build.

post.description:
Generate a presigned POST URL for direct S3 upload.

The returned URL and fields should be used to construct a multipart/form-data
POST request to S3. S3 enforces content-type and size limits via the POST policy.

get.description: List all supported document types.
Get field schema for a specific document type.
Get all fields across all document types.
Search fields across all blueprints.
Get list of response codes and their meanings.
Get list of supported document categories (derived from BDA project config).
Get extraction rules for a tenant.

put.description: Create or update an extraction rule.

post.description: Create a new API key for a client.

get.description:
List API keys.

By default returns only active keys. Pass ``include_inactive=true`` to
return both active and revoked keys.

delete.description:
Deactivate an API key by full hash or hash prefix.

Tenant-admins can only delete keys belonging to their tenant; super-admins
can delete any key.

post.description: Create a new tenant.

get.description: List tenants. Super-admins see all; tenant-admins see only their own.
Get a single tenant by ID.

delete.description: Deactivate a tenant (soft delete). Super-admin only.

get.description: List every user in the pool with their group + tenant assignment.

schema.title: Response List Users V1 Admin Users Get

post.description: Approve a pending user by assigning a role and (for tenant-admin) a tenant.

schema.title: Response Approve User V1 Admin Users  Username  Approve Post

post.description: Change a user's role, or pass ``role: null`` to revoke.

schema.title: Response Change Role V1 Admin Users  Username  Role Post

post.description: Set or clear a user's tenant assignment.

schema.title: Response Change Tenant V1 Admin Users  Username  Tenant Post
Response Delete User V1 Admin Users  Username  Delete

get.description: Return all known audit action strings.

Query audit events.

Super-admins can query any tenant or by action (via GSI).
Tenant-admins can only query their own tenant's events.

List documents by tenant, paginated by createdAt descending.

Super-admins can query any tenant. Tenant-admins are locked to their own.

Note: when status_filter is set, DDB applies Limit before FilterExpression,
so a page may return fewer than `limit` items. Use next_cursor to fetch more.

Get full document detail by job ID.

Super-admins can view any document. Tenant-admins can only view their own.

Get a short-lived presigned URL for previewing the original document.

Returns a URL valid for 5 minutes. Only supports PDF and image files.

List document categories.

Super-admins can omit tenant_id to list all categories across tenants.
Tenant-admins are locked to their own tenant.

post.description: Create a new document category for a tenant.

get.description: Get a single document category.

post.description:
Upload a document and start BDA extraction.

Returns a test_id to poll for results via GET /test/{test_id}.

get.description: Poll for blueprint test results.

post.description: Upload a document via the demo pipeline.

get.description: List demo documents for the authenticated user.
Get demo document detail by job ID.
Get presigned URL for previewing a demo document.

Return the authenticated user's identity context.

Works with both API key and JWT auth. For API key callers, principal is the
key name. For JWT callers, principal is the email or sub.

Note: pending JWT users (no Cognito group) still get 200 here - the UI
needs this to render the "pending approval" state. Access control is
enforced at the individual admin endpoints via verify_jwt_with_role.

Get aggregated metrics for date range.

API key callers see their own tenant's metrics.
JWT super-admins can pass tenant_id or omit for global.
JWT tenant-admins see their own tenant only.

post.description: Report an auth event from the admin UI (login, logout).

tenant_id.title: Tenant Id
tenant_id.description: Required for tenant-admin; ignored for super-admin.

ai_consent_flag.title: Ai Consent Flag
ai_consent_flag.description: Explicit AI processing consent. True = consent granted, processing proceeds normally. False = consent denied, document is stored but not processed.

ai_consent_flag.title: Ai Consent Flag
ai_consent_flag.description: Explicit AI processing consent. True = consent granted, processing proceeds normally. False = consent denied, document is stored but not processed.

external_document_id.title: External Document Id
external_document_id.description: External document identifier (applied to all files in batch)

external_system_id.title: External System Id
external_system_id.description: External system identifier (applied to all files in batch)

ai_consent_flag.title: Ai Consent Flag
ai_consent_flag.description: Explicit AI processing consent. True = consent granted, processing proceeds normally. False = consent denied, document is stored but not processed.

external_document_id.title: External Document Id
external_document_id.description: External document identifier (applied to all files in batch)

external_system_id.title: External System Id
external_system_id.description: External system identifier (applied to all files in batch)

ai_consent_flag.title: Ai Consent Flag
ai_consent_flag.description: Explicit AI processing consent. True = consent granted, processing proceeds normally. False = consent denied, document is stored but not processed.

role.title: Role
role.description: New role, or null to revoke (return user to pending).

tenant_id.title: Tenant Id
tenant_id.description: New tenant, or null to clear.

anyOf.description: Minimum average non-empty field confidence (0.0-1.0) below which an extraction is flagged. When null, the platform default applies.

document_type.title: Document Type
document_type.description: Document type this rule applies to

tenant_id.title: Tenant Id
tenant_id.description: Target tenant. Required for super-admins; ignored for tenant-admins.

blueprint_arn.title: Blueprint Arn
blueprint_arn.description: BDA blueprint ARN for stable reference across renames.

ExtractionRuleRequest.title: ExtractionRuleRequest
ExtractionRuleRequest.description: Request body for creating/updating an extraction rule.

extractionConfidenceFloor.title: Extractionconfidencefloor
extractionConfidenceFloor.description: Tenant override for the extraction confidence floor (0.0-1.0). Null means no override is set and the platform default applies.

anyOf.description: Minimum average non-empty field confidence (0.0-1.0) below which an extraction is flagged. When null, the platform default applies.
